name_en: 【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont series with a modern perspective. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
name_cn:
【With full counter green packaging】!!️GG Marmont series leather bi-fold wallet, Gucci continuously updates colors, adding more refined tones. This bi-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand logo accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill slots.
Model: 428726.
Open dimensions: 21(W) x 9cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 11(W) x 9cm(H)
Color: Olive green.
